root_causes.description: The implementation landed successfully but required many same-day follow-up commits, indicating missing up-front validation of pricing, timeout, and output-contract details before the main refactor merged.
Spec quality was generally good, but late-breaking architectural constraints around Cerebe prompt ACLs forced an in-PR design adjustment and additional documentation churn.
Unresolved bot review comments at merge suggest review feedback was not fully closed out in-thread, reducing confidence in iteration efficiency even though no bypass/admin merge was used.

improvement_actions.proposed_issue_title: Add pre-merge checklist for DF Flow Assessor LLM endpoint refactors
improvement_actions.suggested_fix: Require a short design/validation checklist before coding endpoint migrations: pricing table verified, timeout budget verified, JSON schema validation behavior exercised, pattern-id filtering tested, and review comments linked to commits that resolve them.
improvement_actions.validation_criterion: A subsequent similar PR merges with <=5 pushes and includes checklist evidence in the PR body or linked plan issue.
